title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.585 - Authority to repay state for state general revenue funds used
text:
305.585.  Authority to repay state for state general revenue funds used. — Any and all funds appropriated from the general revenue of the state of Missouri to carry out the provisions of sections 305.500 to 305.585 shall be repaid to the state of Missouri from revenues, if any, generated by the authority's operations.
(L. 1972 H.B. 1341 § 18) 
Effective 2-04-72
